news.t: Faith Investor Services Launches Arimathea Catholic Core Bond ETF
Adjournment of Special Meeting of Shareholders of FIS Bright Portfolios Focused Equity ETF and Approval of FIS Christian Stock Fund Reorganization
It's time to scoop up undervalued stocks in this critical sector of the economy

holdings.infoBox: PRAY is an equity ETF with a total of 67 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics Co Ltd DR stock at 7.65%, NVIDIA at 6.32%, Casey's General Stores at 4.86%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.86%, and Interactive Brokers Group at 3.57%.

overview.description: The FIS Christian Stock Fund (PRAY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI World index. The fund is an actively managed fund that employs a risk-managed approach to invest in stocks from around the world that are perceived as biblically responsible investments. PRAY was launched on Feb 8, 2022 and is issued by Faith Investor Services.

data.title: Faith Investor Services Launches Arimathea Catholic Core Bond ETF
data.text: New ETF offers Catholic investors a core bond holding to align their faith and fixed income investments. SCOTTSDALE, Ariz.

data.title: It's time to scoop up undervalued stocks in this critical sector of the economy
data.text: Expanding your horizons and considering neglected sectors can help you identify bargain opportunities while defending your investment portfolio from a stock-market decline.
